nasb.text: treacherous, reckless, conceited, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God,

esv.text: treacherous, reckless, swollen with conceit, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God,

cnv.text: 賣主賣友、容易衝動、傲慢自大、愛享樂過於愛　神，

ccb.text: 出卖朋友、任意妄为、自高自大、沉溺享乐、不爱上帝，

csbs.text: 背叛出卖、任意妄为、自以为是，爱享乐过于爱神，
